name: analyze_patent
description: Perform 5-step structured patent analysis on a patent document (PDF, text, or database ID). Returns a structured Markdown report with: (1) full text extraction, (2) key figure selection (4-5 figures corresponding to independent claims), (3) patent structure parsing, (4) complete report generation (bibliographic data, abstract, claim tree, glossary, component list, FTO analysis), and (5) result reporting. This is the core function of the patent-structured-analysis skill v3.0.

source.description: Input type: 'patent_id' queries a SQLite database, 'pdf' reads a local PDF file, 'text' analyzes raw patent text.

value.description: The patent ID (e.g., US11311692B2), absolute PDF file path, or raw patent text including claims and description.

db_path.description: SQLite database path. Required when source='patent_id'. Default: /home/rocky/patent-agent/data/patents.db
